headline: Is This the Right Time to Hold Thermo Fisher Stock in Your Portfolio?
summary: TMO's acquisitions and resilient pharma, biotech and diagnostics demand support growth, but currency swings and fierce competition remain risks.

headline: Thermo Fisher Expands Drug Discovery And Diagnostics While Shares Lag Targets
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE:TMO) opened its Cryo Electron Microscopy Drug Discovery Center in South San Francisco. The company introduced new culture media to support rapid Candida detection. Thermo Fisher also launched a pharmacogenetic test to support personalized dosing of immunosuppressive therapy for transplant patients. For investors tracking NYSE:TMO, these product launches sit within the company’s core strengths in life science tools, diagnostics, and pharma services. Cryo...
